note: Auto-split capsule send: fix the chunk counter denominator and replace the bare 'Insufficient funds' error with a structured funds breakdown. (1) The progress headline was 'Auto-split: 0 / 1 transactions broadcast' for a 5-chunk send because the denominator was broadcastTxids.length + (failure ? 1 : 0) — i.e. only counted the chunks the loop had touched. Now uses chunks.length so the user sees 0 / 5 / 5 / 5 etc. Same fix applied to the failure heading: 'Stopped at chunk #1 of 5: ...'. (2) The single-line 'Insufficient funds' message gave the user no signal about whether the cause was immature coinbase, in-flight UTXOs from a previous send, or a chunk size that genuinely exceeded the spendable mature balance. autoSplitCapsuleSend now captures a per-chunk diagnostic snapshot before buildAndSignTx (mature/immature/in-flight/available UTXO counts and stocks, requested chunk amount, latest fee estimate, chain height) and attaches it to the failure record. The report renders a red side-panel: Spendable available, Needed for chunk + fee, Short by, Immature with conf-window note, In-flight reserved with held-by-recent-sends note, plus a footer with mature totals and the relation 'Spendable = mature − in-flight'. (3) The map+filter pipeline that converts raw rpc UTXOs into the spendable set was restructured into one map then two parallel filters so the immature set is computed without re-reading rawUtxos and so the SAT conversion happens exactly once (defends against the future regression of multiplying by SAT twice). NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure wallet UX fix. Self-tests already cover splitCapsulePaymentIntoBatches; manual test path: 5-chunk send against a wallet whose spendable mature balance is < total of any one chunk + fee, expect the panel to show concrete numbers, the chunk #1 of 5 wording, and a non-truncated denominator.
